<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill in the sections below to help reviewers.
Remove sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Related issue

Closes #_issue-number_ <!-- or "Refs #N" if it doesn't fully close it -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Test plan

How did you verify this works? List concrete steps + which OS you tested on.

- [ ] Tested on Windows 10/11
- [ ] Tested on Ubuntu 22.04
- [ ] Tested on macOS 13+
- [ ] TypeScript compile clean (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] No console errors in DevTools after change
- [ ] Existing functionality unaffected (smoke test of related pages)

## Screenshots / recordings

If UI change, attach before/after screenshots or a short clip.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My branch follows naming convention (`fix/`, `feat/`, `docs/`, etc.)
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have NOT included any secrets, tokens, or personal info in the diff

## Additional notes

Anything reviewers should know? Trade-offs considered? Future follow-ups?
